name: Sea Battle
desc: Texas Hold'em meets Battleship — hidden boards, ZK shot validation, on-chain result. No trusted referee.

name: Midnight Identity
desc: Signed W3C-style credentials verified on-chain. Age-gated commerce without revealing PII. ECDSA circuit.

name: Local Network
desc: One-command local Midnight stack — node, proof server, indexer via Docker Compose. HD wallet funding included.

name: OZ Compact Contracts
desc: Battle-tested Compact primitives: Ownable, AccessControl, Pausable, FungibleToken, NFT, MultiToken. Alpha.

name: Midnight MCP
desc: MCP server giving AI assistants live access to Midnight docs, Compact examples, and the hosted compiler.

name: Midnight Agent Skills
desc: 4 modular agent skills for building on Midnight — wallet, contract, indexer, and proof-server wrappers.

name: NFT Auction Private
desc: Privacy-preserving NFT auction — sealed bids, ZK reveal, winner proven without exposing losing bids.

name: oink bridge
desc: 1:1 peg bridge between Cardano and Midnight tokens. Proof-of-lock on ADA side, mint on Midnight.

name: Legit Sick
desc: Privacy-enhanced medical certificate verification. Prove you're sick without revealing your diagnosis. Midnight Summit hackathon.

name: SpillSafe
desc: Corruption reporting platform. Submit evidence anonymously — identity never stored or revealed on-chain.

name: ZK VCR
desc: Prove health criteria (BMI, blood pressure, age) using ZK proofs without revealing raw health data.

name: WorkProof
desc: Work verification and proof-of-contribution tracking. Prove you completed tasks without revealing your identity.

name: Ligero Prover
desc: High-performance post-quantum ZK virtual machine. Compatible with Midnight's proof infrastructure.
